title: SE2 Backpack Upgrades — Craftable Item Record (extends base-game resource-item schema)
description: Record shape for craftable non-block items. This mod EXTENDS the base-game schema with two changes: (1) subcategory enum adds 'upgrade' for permanent suit/backpack fittings; (2) a new optional `effects` object carries machine-readable capacity multipliers on character_gear upgrades. All other fields are unchanged from the base-game schema.

subcategory.description: Present on character-gear records. Values: tool, weapon, consumable, upgrade (upgrade = mod-added, permanent suit/backpack fitting).

recipes.description: Production paths. Items can have multiple recipes (e.g. Smelter + Backpack).

usedIn.description: Downstream recipe names or block names that consume this item.

usedBy.description: Present on ammunition records — block ids of weapons that consume this ammo.

roundsPerUnit.description: Present on ammunition records — projectiles per inventory stack.

effects.description: Present on character_gear records with subcategory 'upgrade'. Machine-readable stat multipliers applied to the player's suit/backpack when equipped. Exactly one category-specific multiplier is set per upgrade; values are multiplicative (1.5 = +50%) and REPLACE the previous tier (not additive).

producedBy.description: Free-form producer note when the item isn't directly craftable (e.g. power cells). null when unknown.
